01 / About

A bowl, your way —
built fresh, mixed loud.

Bibimbap means “mixed rice,” and at KOBAP that mix is yours to command. We set down the rice, the vegetables, the marinated proteins and sauces — you choose the story.

Our kitchen leans toward the fast-casual, but nothing about it is rushed. Rice is steamed to order, vegetables seasoned the old way, and every bowl finishes with a crack of soft-yolk egg and a drizzle of our house gochujang. Healthy, honest, and loud with flavor.

0MSG / Shortcuts
100%Made in-house
45+Farm partners
DailyBanchan rotation
[ kitchen in motion ]
02 / Signature Bowls

Three ways to
start strong.

[ classic bibimbap ]

Classic

$13

Seasoned spinach, bean sprouts, carrot, shiitake and marinated beef over short-grain rice. Finished with sesame, scallion and a runny yolk.

House favoriteContains beef
[ spicy chicken ]

Spicy Chicken

$14

Gochujang-glazed chicken thigh, crisp kimchi, cucumber ribbons and roasted sesame rice. Built for the heat-seekers.

Best sellerSpicy ● ● ●
[ veggie bibimbap ]

Veggie

$12

Grilled tofu, seasonal greens, pickled radish, carrot, shiitake and our sesame-soy house blend. Egg optional — you pick.

Plant basedUnder 600 cal
